title: pleurocoronis laphamioides var. pauciseta
intro: Pleurocoronis laphamioides var. pauciseta, also known as the few-bracted Pleurocoronis, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Pleurocoronis laphamioides var. pauciseta include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as reducing fever and alleviating digestive problems. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be administered internally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
